_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of what constitutes a “threat” to a network.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack surfaces, threat actors, and applicable mitigating controls.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.494), RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.483).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.538). Shared vocabulary: [threat]. DCWF-only terms [constitutes, knowledge, network] vs WIDAI-only terms [actors, ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.893, R=0.866). P exceeds R by 0.027 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of what constitutes a “threat” to a network." and "Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.530 ≈ STS 0.538 (gap 0.009). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [threat] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.3%. Shared tokens: [threat]. DCWF-only: [constitutes, knowledge, network]. WIDAI-only: [actors, ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct].
